message:
feat(layout,parser,render-term): curved cylinder caps, deterministic ordering, and layout-aware gantt rendering

shapes: Enhances cylinder path rendering with curved QuadTo caps and
safety constraints for ry/fold dimensions. Adds test validating
curved cap geometry.

lib: Fixes min/max calculation in obstacle nudging to ensure proper
coordinate ordering.

ir_builder: Replaces HashMap with BTreeMap for node/cluster/subgraph/
label lookups to guarantee deterministic iteration order.

renderer: Refactors gantt cell rendering to use actual layout
positions instead of simple index-based positioning. Adds
comprehensive test for task labels and layout-aware positioning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-use std::collections::{BTreeMap, HashMap};
+use std::collections::BTreeMap;
 
 use fm_core::{

@@ -36,10 +36,10 @@ struct StateCompositeContext {

     // Lookups for uniqueness

-    label_index_by_text: HashMap<(String, Vec<IrLabelSegment>), IrLabelId>,

+    label_index_by_text: BTreeMap<(String, Vec<IrLabelSegment>), IrLabelId>,
 
     warnings: Vec<String>,
     /// Track nodes that were auto-created (for dangling edge recovery)

             ir: MermaidDiagramIr::empty(diagram_type),
